name: aurora-ai-model-selector
title: Aurora AI Model Selector
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Aurora-native model selector parity surface from AI Elements.
docs:
Aurora block that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/ai/model-selector.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-ai-elements`.
